title: [CI:BUILD] Build universal Podman binary for Mac installer
body:
Build universal Podman binary and installer for Mac. Update GitHub action to build it too.

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]". That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *ashley-cui* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [ashley-cui] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@containers/podman-maintainers Would also like to get this in before today's RC, PTAL

@Luap99 Both are universal! 
```
gvproxy:           Mach-O universal binary with 2 architectures: [x86_64:Mach-O 64-bit executable x86_64] [arm64]
gvproxy (for architecture x86_64):	Mach-O 64-bit executable x86_64
gvproxy (for architecture arm64):	Mach-O 64-bit executable arm64
vfkit:             Mach-O universal binary with 2 architectures: [x86_64:Mach-O 64-bit executable x86_64] [arm64]
vfkit (for architecture x86_64):	Mach-O 64-bit executable x86_64
vfkit (for architecture arm64):	Mach-O 64-bit executable arm64
```
And the new Podman binaries with this PR:
```
podman:            Mach-O universal binary with 2 architectures: [x86_64:Mach-O 64-bit executable x86_64] [arm64]
podman (for architecture x86_64):	Mach-O 64-bit executable x86_64
podman (for architecture arm64):	Mach-O 64-bit executable arm64
podman-mac-helper: Mach-O universal binary with 2 architectures: [x86_64:Mach-O 64-bit executable x86_64] [arm64]
podman-mac-helper (for architecture x86_64):	Mach-O 64-bit executable x86_64
podman-mac-helper (for architecture arm64):	Mach-O 64-bit executable arm64
```
